title: Consultor SCP
description: Development of enterprise solutions with Java and Spring Boot for internal applications and client projects, improving operational efficiency and optimizing key company processes.
ERP system integration using JavaScript, SAPUI5, and XSJS on SAP HANA, developing both the frontend and backend services to achieve seamless interoperability between platforms.
Strengthening skills in software architecture and full-stack web development, participating in the implementation of critical functionalities and the continuous improvement of internal projects.

title: Systems Assistant (Trainee)
description: I developed a web application in Java and Spring Boot for managing the Human Talent area, centralizing supplier information and optimizing data control, access, and traceability, which significantly reduced management times and improved operational efficiency.
